# Core
numpy
fastapi>=0.110
uvicorn[standard]>=0.29

# --- Pick ONE backend below ---

# Apple Silicon (MLX) — recommended on Mac
# pip install mlx-audio
# Default model: mlx-community/VibeVoice-Realtime-0.5B-6bit

# PyTorch (Linux / Windows / CUDA)
# Option A – vibevoice package (recommended):
#   git clone https://github.com/microsoft/VibeVoice && cd VibeVoice
#   pip install -e .[streamingtts]
#   Default model: microsoft/VibeVoice-Realtime-0.5B
#
# Option B – transformers (experimental):
#   pip install torch transformers
